  ┃  # Wrote weather.py
  ┃                                                                                                                                                                           Context
  ┃    1 import requests                                                                                                                                                      13,599 tokens
  ┃    2 import sys                                                                                                                                                           7% used
  ┃    3                                                                                                                                                                      $0.00 spent
  ┃    4 def get_weather(city):
  ┃    5     url = f"https://wttr.in/{city}?format=j1"                                                                                                                        LSP
  ┃    6     try:                                                                                                                                                             • pyright
  ┃    7         response = requests.get(url, timeout=10)
  ┃    8         if response.status_code == 200:                                                                                                                              Modified Files
  ┃    9             data = response.json()                                                                                                                                   weather.py                        +26
  ┃   10             current = data["current_condition"][0]
  ┃   11             print(f"\nWeather in {city}:")
  ┃   12             print(f"Temperature: {current['temp_C']}°C ({current['temp_F']}°F)")
  ┃   13             print(f"Condition: {current['weatherDesc'][0]['value']}")
  ┃   14             print(f"Humidity: {current['humidity']}%")
  ┃   15             print(f"Wind: {current['windspeedKmph']} km/h")
  ┃   16         else:
  ┃   17             print(f"Error: Could not fetch weather for {city}")
  ┃   18     except Exception as e:
  ┃   19         print(f"Error: {e}")
  ┃   20
  ┃   21 if __name__ == "__main__":
  ┃   22     if len(sys.argv) > 1:
  ┃   23         city = " ".join(sys.argv[1:])
  ┃   24     else:
  ┃   25         city = input("Enter city name: ")
  ┃   26     get_weather(city)
  ┃   27
  ┃

  ┃  Thinking: I've written a Python script that uses wttr.in (a free weather service that doesn't require an API key). The user can run it with a city name as
  ┃  argument or it will prompt for input.

     Done. Run with:

     python weather.py "City Name"

     Uses wttr.in (no API key needed). Tell me the city when ready.                                                                                                      ▄
